prompt:
Vertical 4:5 portrait social-media poster, GTA Vice City aesthetic for the Muha Members Giveaway. TWO REFERENCE IMAGES: the FIRST is the locked TYPOGRAPHY / PALETTE / MUHA LOGO / LAYOUT anchor — reproduce its warm-cream stone-textured headline letters with reddish-orange tint and strong red glow halo, red banner subtitle, ornate gold filigree Muha 'M' crest, vertical center layout, all-red palette. The SECOND reference is the BACKGROUND COMPOSITION inspiration — an aerial helicopter-chase night scene with a red sports car doing donuts in an empty lot, police helicopter overhead casting a spotlight beam down onto the car, white tire smoke ring around the car, urban skyline + freeway / arch bridge in the background. Re-create this aerial chase-scene composition but in the Muha campaign's RED-LOCKED Vice City palette.

VERTICAL LAYOUT: text-and-logo block VERTICALLY CENTERED. Muha crest near top-third mark, headline at vertical center, subtitle banner just below center. Lower portion shows the aerial chase background.

PALETTE — LOCKED: dominant CRIMSON / SCARLET RED (#B81020 / #E0202C / #FF2F3F) with warm orange-red accents, deep black, wet-asphalt charcoal, warm gold accents on the Muha crest. The helicopter spotlight beam can be warm pure white (typical searchlight), and the tire smoke a slightly warm off-white tinted by the red ambient — these are the only non-red elements. ABSOLUTELY NO pink, NO magenta, NO teal, NO cyan, NO purple, NO blue. The urban skyline + warehouses + bridge in the background are silhouetted in red-orange ambient light, with red/warm-amber streetlights only.

HEADER TYPOGRAPHY — match the first reference exactly:
  • Bold blocky sans-serif letterforms, thick uniform strokes (heavy GTA-style display face, NOT chrome, NOT silver).
  • Letter FACE: warm cream / pale peach with subtle reddish-orange tint, faint stone / concrete / weathered-marble TEXTURE — slightly grainy and organic.
  • Letter OUTLINE: thin dark maroon / dried-blood red.
  • GLOW: strong warm red-orange glow halo radiating from behind and beneath every letter.
  • DEPTH: 3D extruded shadow underneath each letter in deep maroon.
  • POSTURE: slight forward italic skew (~5-8°).
  • All caps, perfectly horizontally centered, two stacked lines: line 1 'THIS CAR', line 2 'COULD BE YOURS'. The phrase is exactly 'THIS CAR COULD BE YOURS'.

SUBTITLE: same red banner-bar styling as the first reference, all caps, perfectly horizontally centered directly below the headline, reading 'ENTER TO WIN'. Red bar background, white-stroked text.

MUHA LOGO: ornate gold filigree Muha 'M' crest at top center, exact match to the first reference.

BACKGROUND — AERIAL VICE CITY CHASE SCENE, ALL-RED PALETTE:
  • High elevated angle looking down on an empty urban lot from above.
  • A red Dodge Challenger SRT in the center of the lot, viewed from above, mid-donut/burnout with a perfect circular smoke trail surrounding it (the smoke is white-warm, tinted slightly red from the ambient).
  • A police helicopter in the upper-left of the frame, with a focused warm-white SPOTLIGHT BEAM angled down onto the Challenger, illuminating the car and smoke ring.
  • Surrounding urban environment in red-night-noir: graffiti walls, low warehouses, chain-link fences, freeway arched bridge in the mid-distance, distant Miami skyline glowing warm red-orange.
  • Wet asphalt with red ambient reflections.
  • Helicopter rotor blur visible at top.
  • Composition matches the second reference's aerial helicopter-chase framing.

Retain the first reference's grain / halation / cinematic finish. Sharp focus on headline, subtitle, Muha logo, the Challenger, and the spotlight beam; surroundings cinematic with shallow depth-of-field. Photorealistic editorial movie poster. No additional text beyond what's specified above.
refImages: Muha Giveaway Redesigned/Approved/Get on the List.png
